sourcePolicy: HSK Standard Course PDFs are the preferred source for lesson order, vocabulary correction, grammar scope, and topic organization. Full copyrighted textbook dialogues/readings are not copied verbatim; the app uses short references and original practice generated from verified lesson topics and local vocabulary.

1.status: Needs OCR/text-layer PDF before exact dialogue and reading import.

2.status: English lesson titles and grammar outline were readable. Chinese text extraction is damaged, so exact dialogues/readings are not imported verbatim.

3.status: Needs OCR/text-layer PDF before exact dialogue and reading import.

4A.status: English lesson titles were readable. Chinese text extraction is damaged, so exact dialogues/readings are not imported verbatim.

4B.status: Needs OCR/text-layer PDF before exact dialogue and reading import.

5A.status: Analyzed 198-page uploaded PDF. Text extraction returned page markers only, so exact textbook vocabulary, dialogues, and readings require OCR before faithful import.
